context.projectOverview: agent-bober: multi-agent autonomous code-gen harness (TypeScript ESM, NodeNext, Zod config, filesystem state under .bober/). This spec (spec-20260628-research-scheduler) adds a new additive src/research/ module for recurring multi-model research jobs. Sprint 1 of 5 builds only the job definition layer: schema + JSON store + CLI. No execution, no egress, no scheduling yet.
relevantFiles: src/state/facts.ts (FactStore schema + clock-free store pattern to mirror, esp. L20-33)
src/cli/commands/medical.ts (registerMedicalCommand + commander subcommand pattern + injected deps, esp. L41 deps and L130-185 subcommands)

principles: Read .bober/principles.md from disk. Key hard gates: TypeScript strict mode zero type errors; ESLint consistent-type-imports (use `import type`), unused vars errored (prefix `_` to escape); ESM everywhere with `.js` import extensions for NodeNext; Zod for all config validation; filesystem state as JSON under .bober/ (no DB for jobs); async fs only (node:fs/promises, no *Sync); collocated *.test.ts; conventional commits.
notes: Sprint contract at .bober/contracts/sprint-spec-20260628-research-scheduler-1.json and spec at .bober/specs/spec-20260628-research-scheduler.json. Cadence: pick a string enum ('daily'|'weekly'|'monthly') OR cron-like string and document it in the schema doc-comment; do NOT compute next-due dates yet (Sprint 4). Do NOT touch src/fleet/, src/medical/, or src/orchestrator/pipeline.ts.
